name: ml-sidecar
description: Python FastAPI sidecar — embeddings + calibration + classifiers. Run via Docker or `pip install -r requirements.txt && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8001`.

scripts.dev: node -e "console.log('ml-sidecar runs via docker compose up -d (or: cd apps/ml-sidecar && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8001)')"
scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Built via docker compose build ml-sidecar')"
